title: ecbolium viride
intro: Ecbolium viride, also known as the green ecbolium, is a perennial herb native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The leaves of Ecbolium viride have been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Ecbolium viride include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
